ogTitle: Yelgun vs Yellow Pinch: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yelgun and Yellow Pinch.
heading: Yelgun vs Yellow Pinch — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yelgun, New South Wales and Yellow Pinch, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yellow Pinch has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Yelgun (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yelgun or Yellow Pinch safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yelgun has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Yellow Pinch scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yelgun scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Yellow Pinch scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yelgun or Yellow Pinch?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yellow Pinch has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
